name: Miglior Cat Food Chicken & Rabbit Alutray 100g
description: COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives 50% (chicken 5%, rabbit 5%), minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 81%, Crude protein 9,8%, Crude fat 6%, Crude fibres 0,5%, Crude ash 1,8%. Nutritional additives/kg: Vitamin E 7,5 mg, Zinc (Zinc sulphate monohydrate) 5,0 mg, Copper (Copper (II) sulphate pentahydrate) 0,2 mg, Manganese (Manganous sulphate monohydrate) 1,7 mg, Iodine (Potassium iodide) 0,7 mg. HOW TO USE: The product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place.
